assertions.expectation: Distinguishes between dev (Rapid) and prod (Stable) clusters in the checklists
assertions.reason: The response clearly identifies 2 dev clusters on Rapid channel and 2 prod clusters on Stable, with cluster-specific checkboxes and mentions that dev clusters upgrade first on Rapid

assertions.expectation: Recognizes Autopilot limitations (no node management, no SSH, mandatory resource requests)
assertions.reason: Response explicitly mentions Autopilot limitations including no node pool management, no privileged containers, and emphasizes mandatory resource requests as critical

assertions.expectation: Includes API deprecation checks with kubectl commands
assertions.reason: While mentions checking deprecation insights dashboard, does not provide specific kubectl commands to check for deprecated API usage

assertions.expectation: Mentions mandatory resource requests as an Autopilot-specific concern
assertions.reason: Multiple mentions of mandatory resource requests, specifically calling it the '#1 Autopilot upgrade failure' and including specific validation checks

assertions.expectation: Pre-upgrade checklist includes workload readiness items (PDBs, bare pods, graceful shutdown)
assertions.reason: Includes terminationGracePeriodSeconds for graceful shutdown, and post-upgrade checks for PDBs, though bare pods not explicitly mentioned in pre-upgrade

assertions.expectation: Post-upgrade checklist includes version verification commands
assertions.reason: Provides specific gcloud commands to verify cluster versions: 'gcloud container clusters describe CLUSTER --region REGION --format="value(currentMasterVersion)"'

assertions.expectation: Post-upgrade checklist includes workload health validation
assertions.reason: Comprehensive workload health validation including deployments, pods status, StatefulSets, PVCs, and application smoke tests

assertions.expectation: Recommends testing on dev clusters before prod auto-upgrade
assertions.reason: Explicitly recommends dev-first validation strategy and includes dedicated section for dev environment validation with soak time

assertions.expectation: Mentions that checking the GKE release schedule gives ~1 month best-case advance notice for new minor upgrades, beyond the 72h notification
assertions.reason: Only mentions 72h advance notice via Cloud Logging, does not discuss the ~1 month advance notice available through GKE release schedule monitoring
Comprehensive observability sections including monitoring baselines, Cloud Logging, alerting rules, metrics pipeline, and error rate validation
